current_sprint.sprint_name: PDF Certificate, Stats, Export View & Notification Templates
current_sprint.goal: PDF certificate (US-047), certification stats (US-048), super-admin export clearances view (US-067), notification template management (US-075), migration verification (TM-3)
current_sprint.note: TM-3 deferred again — requires live PostgreSQL. All user-facing stories delivered.

known_gaps: notification-template.service.ts lines 45-59 (seedFromFiles loop body — requires live filesystem fixtures)
notification.service.ts lines 78-79, 128-129 (fs.existsSync/readFileSync file fallback — requires .hbs file on disk)
notification.template_lookup_order: Redis cache (600s) → DB record → .hbs file in assets/templates/

unit.coverage_note: Drop from 98.41% due to filesystem-dependent paths in seedFromFiles() and file fallback in send() — not exercisable without live .hbs fixtures

integration.note: Testcontainers-based; run with docker compose up

e2e.note: Self-initializing DB via createTestApp(); run with docker compose up

next_actions: Sprint 6 CLOSED — 21/22 SP, 271 unit tests, 96.1% statements / 86.44% branches
TM-3 deferred (2nd sprint): run migration chain verification when PostgreSQL is available
Steps: docker compose --profile core up -d postgres && npm run migration:run && npm run migration:generate -- --check
Font files required before GET /certifications/:id/certificate.pdf works at runtime:
Backlog update: mark US-047, US-048, US-067, US-075 as Done in PRODUCT-BACKLOG.md
US-058: Track QR scan events (append-only log) — 5 SP (deferred from Sprint 6)
US-016: Manage SDOQ product types (super-admin) — 5 SP
US-044: Assign inspectors to inspections — 3 SP
US-076: View failed notification counts — 3 SP
US-086: Manage user roles and permissions — 5 SP
decisions_made: PDF library: PDFKit (zero Docker changes, pure Node.js, supports RTL text alignment)
PDF layout: single multilingual page (FR primary + AR RTL block + ZGH block) — official Moroccan documents carry all designations
Arabic shaping: Amiri-Regular.ttf with align:right — full ligature shaping via pdfkit-arabic is Phase 2
Stats dimensions: status + region + product type + date range filter — YAGNI (no trend charts in v1)
Stats cache: Redis 300s, cache key stats:certifications:{from|all}:{to|all} — staleness acceptable for reporting
Template storage: DB-override + file fallback (existsSync → readFileSync) — safe default, rollback = DELETE record
Template cache: Redis 600s per code:channel:language key, DEL on PUT/DELETE
NotificationTemplateService.onModuleInit() seeds DB from .hbs files on startup
jest.mock('fs') blanket mock conflicts with TypeORM path-scurry — use real fs (existsSync returns false in test env)
CACHE_MANAGER must be provided in all test modules that use CertificationService or NotificationService
GET /certifications/stats registered before GET /certifications/:id to prevent NestJS UUID param collision
FindOptionsWhere<NotificationTemplate> required instead of Partial<> for TypeORM strict find() typing
US-058 (QR scan events) deferred from Sprint 6 — touches public hot path, better with monitoring in place (Phase 2)
i18n is a controller-level transform — verifyQrCode() service signature unchanged; cache stays language-neutral
PagedResult<T> added to existing pagination.dto.ts (avoids naming collision with PaginatedResult<T> in pagination.interface.ts)
cooperative_id JWT claim already in CurrentUserPayload (snake_case) — no interface change needed
user.cooperative_id ?? user.sub fallback used in /my endpoints for development safety
TM-2 (notification error path) was pre-existing in notification.service.spec.ts line 131
QR download uses StreamableFile + @Res({passthrough:true}) pattern — avoids raw res.send() in controller
qrcode.toBuffer() for PNG, qrcode.toString({type:'svg'}) for SVG — both converted to Buffer for StreamableFile
resolveMessageKey() pure function in constants file — expired takes priority over status check
collectCoverageFrom scoped to service + listener files only (controllers/DTOs/modules at 0% by design in unit tests)
Redis QR cache eviction in-service (not Kafka-event-driven) — same-process, no round-trip
TTL 300s for GRANTED and RENEWED only — REVOKED/DENIED/EXPIRED must be real-time
makeMockEm() factory pattern for dataSource.transaction tests — create/save/query stubs
useValue (not useFactory) for all test mocks that need external control
em.create() + em.save() pattern for TypeORM JSONB strict typing
Modular monolith architecture chosen over microservices for v1
Redpanda over Apache Kafka (lighter, Kafka-compatible)
PostgreSQL schemas per module (not separate databases)
HMAC-SHA256 for QR code signing
CertificationEvent ledger: append-only, currentStatus materialized column
applyTransition() uses dataSource.transaction() for atomic event + status update

backlog_status.note: Pending backlog update: mark US-047, US-048, US-067, US-075 as Done
